capacity: 50,000 lbs (37,500 lbs max for parallelogram rated capacity)

installation_requirements.installation_type: Track assisted - runs on parallelogram lift runway rails

features: Air/hydraulic powered jacking beam for parallelogram lifts
Track assisted - rolls along parallelogram lift runways
50,000 lb capacity (37,500 lb rated for parallelogram version)
5 holes per side for versatile pad positioning
Standard yoke pads and flat pads included
Height adapters in 3 sizes (5 inch, 7 1/2 inch, 10 inch) included

UL Standard 201 certified for garage equipment

certifications: Tested and certified by Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory (NRTL)
